apps.name: Every Byte Counts
apps.subtitle: Track cellular data against your monthly cap
apps.localizedDescription:
Track your cellular data usage against a monthly quota — no VPN, no login, no carrier account.

Features:
• Data used / remaining / % consumed / days left
• Day-by-day and month-by-month history
• Recency-weighted forecast: a remaining daily budget and projected end-of-cycle total
• Estimated euro cost of any overage
• Threshold alerts (50 / 80 / 100%)
• Home Screen and Lock Screen widgets

Figures are an on-device estimate from the system interface counters and may differ a few percent from your carrier's billing.
apps.versionDescription: Initial source. No release published yet.
